action_text: Wait 2 seconds for the report to finish loading
rationale: The page shows “Loading report…”. Waiting briefly should allow the chart/data to render so we can read incident counts by agent.
After the report loads, the visualization may appear further down the page. Scrolling can bring the chart with agent counts into view.
If the chart isn’t grouped by “Assigned to,” opening Edit report will let us confirm or switch the breakdown to agents so we can get the correct counts.

action_text: Click the “Info” (i) button for report details
rationale: The info panel may show key configuration (e.g., Group by/Breakdown). This verifies whether the report is by “Assigned to” (agents) without changing settings.
If the content is already present but off-screen, an additional scroll may be needed to expose the chart/table with incident counts per agent.
